External teaching sample

Brief Studio

A small imported application that teaches AutoByteus app authors how to combine the frontend SDK, backend SDK, app-owned migrations, and durable event projection.

Waiting for the host bootstrap payload…
Teaching details

Hidden by default so the application stays focused on the brief list, detail view, and review workflow.
